sections.paragraph:
Original: נאץ

Transliteration: nâ'ats

Phonetic: naw-ats'

BDB Definition:

  1. to spurn, contemn, despise, abhor
    1. (Qal) to spurn, contemn
    2. (Piel)
      1. to spurn
      2. to cause to contemn
    3. (Hiphil) to spurn
    4. (Hithpolel) to be contemned

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1274

Part(s) of speech: Verb
